nodes.speaker: King Aldren
nodes.text: Step back from the dais. This is a Pure Rite, and you know it.

nodes.speaker: Princess
nodes.text: I know what it is. I am still here.

nodes.speaker: King Aldren
nodes.text: You will silence yourself or I will silence you for you.

nodes.speaker: Princess
nodes.text: Then silence me. I will not pretend to be one thing in front of these people.

nodes.speaker: Queen
nodes.text: Aldren. Not in front of the witnesses. Not like this.

nodes.speaker: King Aldren
nodes.text: Captain. Hold the line. The boy is not to leave the dais.
